pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script injects '(Legacy T-800 specification).' dynamically into selected requirements.
verifier.py script checks if 'priority' value is 'low' or 'l' case-insensitive.
verifier.py script checks if the 'text' field upper-cased starts with '[DEPRECATED]'.
setup_task.sh writes the ground truth target IDs to this exact path and export_result.sh returns it.
setup_task.sh operates on the file at $TASK_PROJECT_DIR/documents/SRS.json.

privileged_info_summary: The task dynamically modifies a base project to inject '(Legacy T-800 specification).' into random requirement descriptions. The targeted string is 'T-800'. The target requirements' priority must be set to 'Low' and their text must be prepended with '[DEPRECATED]'. The ground truth file containing the target requirement IDs is stored at '/tmp/legacy_targets.json' and the SRS document is located relatively at 'documents/SRS.json'. All metadata claims have been verified through source code analysis of the setup and verifier scripts.
